metadata.title: Conversational Project Initialization with AI-Powered Approval Gates

story.asA: developer building Chiron's AI-powered workflow system
story.iWant: to implement a conversational chat interface where the PM Agent guides users through project initialization, generates summaries and classifications using Ax signatures, and learns from user feedback via ACE optimizer
story.soThat: users experience a natural, intelligent project setup flow with human-in-the-loop approval gates, and the system continuously improves from user feedback - validating the core thesis of AI-assisted workflow orchestration

task.title: Database Schema Updates
task.subtask: Update packages/db/src/schema/workflows.ts - Add AskUserChatStepConfig TypeScript type
Create ACE and MiPRO schema - packages/db/src/schema/ace.ts
Update agents table schema - Add instructions TEXT field
Apply schema changes - Run db:reset and seed scripts

task.title: AskUserChatStepHandler Implementation
task.subtask: Implement agent initialization with ACE playbook injection
Implement dynamic tool building from config

task.title: Ax-Generation Tool Type
task.subtask: Implement input resolution (variable, context, literal sources)
Implement Ax generation with ChainOfThought/Predict strategies

task.title: Database-Query Tool Type
task.subtask: Implement filter resolution with variable substitution
Implement query execution with JSONB path support

task.title: Approval Flow Backend
task.subtask: Implement approval API - packages/api/src/routers/workflows.ts approveToolCall mutation
Implement rejection API - rejectToolCall mutation with ACE optimizer integration

task.title: Frontend Chat Interface
task.subtask: Add AI Elements components via shadcn CLI
Implement message persistence with Mastra threads

task.title: Frontend Approval Gates
task.subtask: Implement rejection action with feedback input

task.title: Frontend Path Selection UI
task.subtask: Implement path selection with tRPC mutation

task.title: Database Seeding
task.subtask: Seed PM Agent with instructions - packages/scripts/src/seeds/agents.ts
Test seeding - Run db:reset && db:seed and verify

task.title: Integration & End-to-End Testing
task.subtask: End-to-end workflow test - Complete workflow from start to Step 3 completion
State persistence test - Reload mid-conversation and resume

criterion.title: User can chat naturally with PM Agent

checks.check: Step 3 renders chat interface with message bubbles
User can type messages and send them
Agent responds conversationally (not form-based)
Conversation history persists across page reloads
Agent asks clarifying questions before triggering tools

criterion.title: Chat state managed with Mastra threads

checks.check: Mastra thread created on first user message
Thread ID saved to workflow execution variables
Messages stored in mastra.mastra_messages table
Chat history retrievable via Mastra SDK
Agent triggers tool after sufficient conversation
Tool uses Ax signature with ChainOfThought strategy
Summary appears in chat with reasoning (collapsible)
Summary includes key project details from conversation
User can approve or reject with feedback
Tool only executes after project_description variable exists
Uses Ax signature to classify as: quick-flow, method, or enterprise
Classification includes reasoning explaining the decision
User can approve or reject classification
Tool returns validation error if prerequisites missing
Tool auto-executes after complexity approved
Queries workflow_paths table with filters from config
Filters by detected_field_type AND complexity_classification
Supports JSONB path queries (tags->>'complexity')
Results stored in available_workflow_paths variable
Tool renders path cards in chat interface
Cards show path name, description, and why it's recommended
User clicks card to select path
Selection saves to selected_workflow_path_id variable
Tool validates available_workflow_paths exists before executing
Tool executes after workflow path selected
Uses Ax signature with Predict strategy (no CoT)
Generates 3-5 kebab-case project name suggestions
Suggestions based on project description and complexity
Approval gate triggers for user to review suggestions

criterion.title: User can select or provide custom project name

checks.check: User can select one of the suggested names
User can choose "Use custom name instead" option
Custom name input field appears when custom option selected
Custom name validates against pattern: ^[a-z0-9-]+$
Custom name validates length: 3-50 characters
Real-time validation feedback shown to user
Approval triggers after valid selection/custom name provided

criterion.title: Approval gates pause workflow for user decision

checks.check: Tool execution suspends when requiresApproval: true
Approval state saved to workflow_executions.variables
Workflow status changes to "paused"
Frontend displays approval UI (Accept / Reject & Explain buttons)
Workflow resumes on user approval/rejection
Clicking "Accept" saves output to workflow variables
Approved output saved to mipro_training_examples table
Workflow status changes back to "active"
Agent continues to next tool
Final approved value persists (e.g., project_description)

criterion.title: User can reject and provide feedback

checks.check: Clicking "Reject & Explain" shows feedback input
User can type feedback explaining why they rejected
Feedback saves to approval_states.rejection_history
ACE optimizer updates playbook with feedback
Agent regenerates using updated ACE knowledge
User sees updated output for re-approval

criterion.title: ACE playbook updates from rejection feedback

checks.check: Rejection feedback triggers ACE optimizer
New bullet added to ace_playbooks.playbook
Playbook version incremented
totalUpdates counter incremented
Future tool executions include updated playbook context

criterion.title: ACE playbook injected into agent instructions

checks.check: PM Agent instructions loaded from agents.instructions table
ACE playbook loaded from ace_playbooks table
Playbook formatted and appended to instructions
Agent sees "LEARNED PATTERNS" section in prompts
Playbook influences tool generation behavior

criterion.title: Approved outputs saved for future optimization

checks.check: Approval saves input + output to mipro_training_examples
Record includes tool name (for side effect type tracking)
Input includes conversation_history, ace_context, variables
Expected output includes approved value
Rejection history included (for MiPRO analysis)

criterion.title: Tools built from step config at runtime

checks.check: AskUserChatStepHandler reads config.tools array
Each tool config specifies toolType (ax-generation, database-query, custom)
Ax signatures built from config.axSignature specification
Database queries built from config.databaseQuery filters
Tools validate requiredVariables before execution
Input fields can have source: "variable" (from execution.variables)
Input fields can have source: "context" (from Mastra thread)
Input fields can have source: "literal" (static value)
Variable resolution fails gracefully if variable missing
Conversation history fetched via Mastra SDK

criterion.title: Step completes when all tools approved

checks.check: Completion condition checks all required tools approved
Output variables extracted from tool results
Step marked as completed in executedSteps
Workflow advances to next step (Step 4 - future)
All required outputs saved to workflow variables

criterion.title: Anthropic API key configurable in Settings

checks.check: Settings page has Anthropic API key card
User can save, test, update, and remove API key
Key encrypted before storing in database
Key validation with Anthropic API works
Available Claude models displayed with pricing

doc.title: Chiron Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: FR002: System shall execute workflows following BMAD's workflow.xml engine rules (steps, actions, templates, elicitation). FR006: System shall coordinate 2+ AI coding agents executing workflows in parallel with human-in-the-loop approval gates.

doc.title: Epic 1 - Foundation + Workflow-Init Engine
doc.snippet: Implement workflow-init steps 4-6: Analyze complexity (LLM classification), fetch workflow paths (DB query), help choose path (conversational chat). Build llm-generate and ask-user-chat step handlers. Includes Mastra + Ax integration with approval gates and Anthropic API key configuration.

doc.title: Story 1.6 Architecture Summary
doc.snippet: Stack: Mastra + Ax (ACE playbooks). PM Agent chats with user → triggers side effects (generate summary, classify complexity) → User approves/rejects → System learns from feedback using ACE playbooks → Collects approved examples for future MiPRO optimization.

doc.title: Spike: Ax + Mastra Approval Gates for Chiron
doc.snippet: User describes project in conversational chat → LLM triggers side-effect tools (updateSummary, updateComplexity) → Pauses chat → Shows UI modal → User approves/rejects → Chat continues UNTIL all required approvals received. Requires tool calling with human-in-the-loop approval gates, conversation state management, side effects trigger UI changes.

doc.title: Ax Deep Dive: ACE and GEPA Optimizers
doc.snippet: ACE mirrors Generator → Reflector → Curator loop. Represents context as structured bullets, applies incremental deltas, returns serialized playbook. Prevents context collapse with incremental updates. Supports online adaptation in production based on user feedback.

doc.title: Database Schema Architecture
doc.snippet: workflows table: Container for workflow definitions with initializerType, isStandalone, requiresProjectContext. workflow_steps table: Individual steps with stepType, config (JSONB), nextStepNumber. ALL step configuration stored in config JSONB for runtime extensibility.

doc.title: Story 1.6 Architecture Summary
doc.snippet: ace_playbooks table: agent_id, scope (global/user/project), playbook (JSONB structured bullets), version, total_updates. mipro_training_examples table: side_effect_type, input (JSONB), expected_output (JSONB), scorer_results. Mastra schema: mastra_threads, mastra_messages, mastra_resources (working memory), mastra_scorers (quality metrics).

artifact.reason: Core interface that all step handlers must implement. Defines executeStep signature and StepResult interface. New AskUserChatStepHandler must implement this.
Existing ask-user handler implementation. Reference for patterns: config validation, user input processing, variable storage. New chat handler will follow similar structure.
Handles system actions (set-variable, database queries, file operations). Story 1.6 needs database query action for fetching workflow paths with JSONB filtering.
Resolves {{variable}} references using Handlebars. All step handlers use this for config interpolation. ACE playbook injection will use this pattern.
Maps step types to handlers. New AskUserChatStepHandler must be registered here with "ask-user-chat" type.
Defines workflow_steps table with config JSONB field. All step configuration stored here. Story 1.6 adds AskUserChatStepConfig type.
Zod schema for ask-user-chat config validation. Defines systemPrompt, initialMessage, outputVariable, completionCondition. Needs expansion for tool config.
Agents table with llmProvider, llmModel, tools, mcpServers. Story 1.6 adds instructions field for PM Agent system prompt and ACE playbook injection.
Existing step UI component pattern. Handles user input, validation, submission. New AskUserChatStep will follow similar prop interface but with chat UI instead of form.
Main workflow UI container. Renders progress bar, step container, navigation. Chat step will be rendered within this wizard framework.
Encryption utilities for API keys. Story 1.6 uses this for Anthropic API key storage in app_config table.

package.name: @mastra/core
package.purpose: AI agent orchestration framework for PM Agent with tool calling, memory, streaming responses

package.name: @mastra/pg
package.purpose: PostgreSQL storage adapter for Mastra (conversation threads, messages, working memory in mastra.* schema)

package.name: @mastra/memory
package.purpose: Conversation history and semantic recall for agents across sessions

package.name: @mastra/evals
package.purpose: Agent output quality scoring (answer relevancy, completeness metrics) for MiPRO data collection

package.name: @ax-llm/ax
package.purpose: Declarative LLM programming with ACE optimizer (online learning) and MiPRO (offline optimization) for structured outputs

package.name: @ai-sdk/anthropic
package.purpose: Anthropic API integration for Claude models (claude-3-5-sonnet, claude-opus-4) as alternative to OpenRouter

package.name: @ai-sdk/openai
package.purpose: OpenAI API integration for GPT models via Vercel AI SDK

package.name: drizzle-orm
package.purpose: Type-safe ORM for PostgreSQL database operations, JSONB support, schema management

package.name: zod
package.purpose: Runtime schema validation for step configs, API inputs, Ax signatures

package.name: handlebars
package.purpose: Template engine for variable interpolation in workflow configs ({{variable}} syntax)

package.name: @tanstack/react-router
package.purpose: Type-safe routing for web application with file-based route generation

package.name: @tanstack/react-query
package.purpose: Data fetching, caching, and state management for tRPC queries/mutations

package.name: @trpc/client
package.purpose: Type-safe API client for tRPC backend communication

package.name: @trpc/server
package.purpose: Type-safe API server framework for building routers and procedures

package.name: hono
package.purpose: Fast web framework for tRPC adapter and API endpoints

package.name: react
package.purpose: UI framework for building component-based interfaces

package.name: @radix-ui/react-*
package.purpose: Accessible UI primitives (dialog, checkbox, radio, tooltip, etc.) for shadcn/ui components

package.name: lucide-react
package.purpose: Icon library for UI components

package.name: tailwindcss
package.purpose: Utility-first CSS framework for styling

package.name: better-auth
package.purpose: Authentication framework with PostgreSQL session management

constraint.rule: All step handlers MUST implement StepHandler interface with executeStep method
Step configuration MUST be stored in workflow_steps.config JSONB field, not separate tables
All runtime workflow data MUST be stored in workflow_executions.variables JSONB field
API keys MUST be encrypted before storing in app_config table using encryption service
All services and handlers MUST have unit tests using Bun test framework
Variable resolution follows 4-level precedence: system variables → execution variables → step outputs → default values
Conversation history MUST be stored in Mastra storage (mastra.mastra_messages), not workflow_executions.variables
ACE playbook updates MUST increment version number and totalUpdates counter
Approval state MUST be tracked in workflow_executions.variables.approval_states with status, value, reasoning, rejection_history
Chat interface MUST use AI Elements components (@ai-elements registry) for ChatContainer, MessageList, Message, PromptInput, ThinkingIndicator
All TypeScript code MUST follow project conventions: use Bun APIs (import from "node:fs/promises"), async/await patterns, proper error handling

interface.name: StepHandler
MastraAgent
AxSignature
interface.signature:
const signature = ax(` input1:type "description", input2:type "description" -> output1:type "description", output2:type "description" `);
await signature.forward(ai, inputs);

interface.name: AxACE
AcePlaybook
interface.signature: CREATE TABLE ace_playbooks ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY, agent_id UUID REFERENCES agents(id), scope TEXT DEFAULT 'global', user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id), project_id UUID REFERENCES projects(id), playbook JSONB NOT NULL, version INTEGER DEFAULT 1, total_updates INTEGER DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP );

interface.name: MiproTrainingExample
interface.signature: CREATE TABLE mipro_training_examples ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY, side_effect_type TEXT NOT NULL, input JSONB NOT NULL, expected_output JSONB NOT NULL, scorer_results JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMP );

interface.name: WorkflowRouter

standard.rule: All tests MUST use Bun test framework (import from "bun:test")
Test files MUST be named *.test.ts or *.test.tsx
Run tests with: bun test (from project root)
Database tests require test-setup.ts import at top of file
Use describe() blocks for grouping related tests
Use it() for individual test cases
Use beforeEach() for test setup, afterEach() for cleanup
Each test MUST be independent (no shared mutable state between tests)
Step handlers MUST have unit tests validating config, execution, and output
Services MUST mock database calls using test database (DATABASE_URL env var)
API routers MUST test input validation, success cases, and error handling
Test database cleanup MUST happen in afterEach() to prevent pollution
Component tests MUST use @testing-library/react with render, screen, userEvent
Mock functions MUST use mock() from "bun:test"
Use cleanup() in afterEach() to unmount components
Test user interactions with userEvent.setup() and await user.click/type
Verify rendered output with screen.getByRole, screen.getByText
All new step handlers MUST have 80%+ code coverage
All new services MUST have unit tests for public methods
Critical paths (approval gates, ACE updates) MUST have integration tests
Edge cases (network errors, invalid inputs) MUST be tested
Use consistent mock IDs: "test-execution-id", "test-workflow-id", "test-user-id"
Create minimal fixtures (don't over-specify test data)
Use descriptive test data names: "valid-project-name", "invalid-empty-string"
Mock ExecutionContext with all required fields: executionId, workflowId, projectId, userId, executionVariables, systemVariables

location.purpose: Unit tests for AskUserChatStepHandler (chat initialization, tool execution, completion detection)
Unit tests for Mastra service (agent initialization, thread management, message persistence)
Unit tests for ACE optimizer service (playbook loading, online updates, version management)
Unit tests for MiPRO data collector (saving approved examples, scorer integration)
Unit tests for Ax generation tool builder (signature building, input resolution, approval gates)
Unit tests for database query tool (JSONB filtering, variable substitution, query execution)
Unit tests for path selection custom tool
Unit tests for project name generation custom tool
Unit tests for workflow router (approveToolCall, rejectToolCall mutations with ACE integration)
Unit tests for Anthropic API router (key encryption, validation, CRUD operations)
Component tests for AskUserChatStep (message sending, chat history, loading states)
Component tests for approval card (approve/reject actions, feedback input)
Component tests for path selection UI (card rendering, selection action)
Component tests for project name selector (suggestion selection, custom input validation)
Integration test for Step 3-4 workflow flow (chat → summary approval → complexity classification → path fetch)
Test Step 3 seeding with complete tool configuration
Test initial ACE playbook seeding for PM Agent

idea.test: should initialize Mastra agent with PM Agent instructions + ACE playbook
should create Mastra thread on first message and save thread ID to variables
should build tools from config.tools array (ax-generation, database-query, custom types)
should resolve tool input sources (variable, context, literal) correctly
should trigger approval gate when tool has requiresApproval: true
should pause step execution and return requiresUserInput: true on approval gate
should resume execution after approval and continue with tool result
should detect completion when all required tools are approved
should extract output variables from tool results correctly
should validate requiredVariables before tool execution
should handle tool execution errors gracefully with error messages
should load existing ACE playbook from database by agent_id and scope
should apply online update when user rejects tool output
should increment playbook version and totalUpdates on update
should format playbook as structured bullets for injection
should handle missing playbook gracefully (create new one)
should support global, user, and project scopes for playbooks
should save updated playbook to database after online learning
should build Ax signature from config.axSignature specification
should resolve input fields from variable source (execution.variables)
should resolve input fields from context source (Mastra thread history)
should resolve input fields from literal source (static values)
should execute Ax signature with ChainOfThought strategy
should execute Ax signature with Predict strategy (no CoT)
should suspend execution on approval gate and save approval state
should inject ACE playbook into generation context
should validate requiredVariables exist before execution
should return structured output matching expected schema
should execute SELECT query on workflow_paths table
should apply JSONB filter: tags->>'fieldType' = 'greenfield'
should substitute variables in filter values using {{variable}} syntax
should return query results as array in output variable
should handle empty result set gracefully
should validate table name against allowed tables
should handle database errors with clear messages
should save approval state to workflow_executions.variables.approval_states
should include tool name, status, generated value, reasoning in approval state
should save approved output to mipro_training_examples with scorer results
should trigger ACE optimizer update on rejection with feedback
should regenerate tool output after ACE playbook update
should track rejection history in approval state for analysis
should mark workflow as paused when approval gate triggered
should resume workflow and change status to active after approval/rejection
should complete Step 3 conversation → summary approval → complexity classification → path fetch flow
should persist conversation history in Mastra storage across page reloads
should update ACE playbook when user rejects summary with feedback
should save approved summary to mipro_training_examples for future optimization
should execute database query tool and return workflow paths filtered by complexity
should handle network errors during Anthropic API calls gracefully
should render chat interface with message bubbles
should display user messages aligned right (blue)
should display AI messages aligned left (gray)
should show typing indicator while agent generates response
should enable send button only when input has content
should clear input field after sending message
should scroll to bottom when new message arrives
should load conversation history on component mount
should render approval card with generated content preview
should show reasoning in collapsible section
should enable Accept button immediately
should show feedback textarea when Reject button clicked
should disable Reject submit until feedback entered
should call approveToolCall mutation on Accept click
should call rejectToolCall mutation with feedback on Reject submit
should show loading state during approval/rejection
should complete chat turn in under 5 seconds (NFR001)
should render chat message within 100ms of receiving (NFR001)
should handle 50+ messages in thread without performance degradation
should cache ACE playbook to avoid repeated database queries
End-to-end: Start workflow-init → complete Step 3 chat → verify all tools approved → proceed to Step 4
Persistence: Reload page mid-conversation → verify chat history restored
Approval: Reject summary with feedback → verify ACE playbook updated → verify regenerated summary improved
Database: Verify workflow_paths query filters correctly by fieldType and complexity
Anthropic Config: Add API key in Settings → verify encryption → test validation → verify models listed
